title: Feature: Webflow homepage hero redesign
description: Redesigned homepage hero section with new October 2026 banner image. Updated tagline, increased gradient overlay opacity per Pastor Wilkins feedback.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Fix: contact form SMTP configuration
description: Switched WP Mail SMTP from PHP mailer to Gmail SMTP with church Google Workspace credentials. Test emails confirmed delivered.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Chore: plugin updates October 2024
description: Applied pending WordPress plugin updates. All tested on staging before production deploy.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Feature: Webflow CMS initial setup
description: Initialized Webflow project CMS collections for Sermons, Events, Staff, Blog Posts. Configured custom domain DNS and managed SSL.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Fix: mobile nav z-index on iOS 17
description: Fixed sticky nav z-index stacking issue causing overlap on iOS 17 inner pages. Added z-index:100 and padding-top to first page section.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Content: events calendar 2026
description: Added VBS, Church Picnic, Back-to-School Prayer, Fall Revival, Homecoming, Thanksgiving Dinner events to The Events Calendar plugin.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Chore: WordPress core update to 6.7
description: Applied WordPress 6.7 update. Tested on staging first. Minor Gutenberg block alignment fix on Deacon Board page.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Content: children ministry page 2026 curriculum
description: Updated /childrens-ministry with Kingdom Kids and Roots & Wings curriculum. New teacher roster added as table. Gloria Tate reviewed and approved.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Chore: plugin updates November 2026
description: Applied WP Mail SMTP 4.1.2, Yoast SEO 23.4, WP Super Cache 1.12.1, Wordfence 8.0.2, CF7 5.9.8. All staging tests passed.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Feature: Stripe online giving portal
description: Stripe Payment Element embedded on /give page. Three giving categories: Tithe, Building Fund, Missions. Receipt email via Stripe. Pending Pastor Wilkins review of receipt wording.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Feature: sermon archive Webflow CMS migration (WIP)
description: Python CSV script uploading 47 sermon posts to Webflow CMS API. Upgraded to Webflow CMS plan. Mapping custom fields in progress.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Fix: prayer request form notification routing
description: Updated Webflow form notification email to pastor@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org. Still investigating delivery — possible Webflow domain on blocklist.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Content: homepage hero banner update
description: Updated hero with new October 2026 outdoor service banner. Adjusting dark gradient overlay opacity to 0.6 per Pastor Wilkins feedback on text contrast.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Feature: bulletin PDF upload system (WIP)
description: Created Webflow CMS Bulletins collection with date, title, PDF file fields. Gloria Tate Editor access configured. Still testing PDF upload workflow.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Fix: Certbot SSL renewal cron
description: Fixed Certbot cron failing on DNS challenge. Updated Cloudflare API token permissions to include Zone:DNS:Edit. Dry run now succeeds.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Feature: VBS volunteer signup form
description: Webflow form at /vbs-volunteers. Fields include background check consent checkbox per Theresa Nguyen's request. Routing to vbs@shilohbaptistbiloxi.org.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Perf: hero image WebP conversion
description: Converted homepage hero JPEG (2.1MB) to WebP (380KB) using Squoosh. Updated Webflow CMS entry. Retesting Lighthouse — expecting 70+ mobile score.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: A11y: gallery image alt text
description: Added alt text field to Webflow Gallery CMS collection. Batch-updating via Webflow API for all 45 images. WCAG 2.1 AA compliance.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Content: staff directory associate pastor
description: Added Rev. Darnell Hooks (Associate Pastor, joined March 2026) to /staff page with headshot and bio text from church office.
author: calvin-hargrove

title: Content: church history 75th anniversary (WIP)
description: Uploading revised church history copy from Pastor Wilkins. Need to compress and upload 12 anniversary photos before this MR can be published.
author: calvin-hargrove
